prompt: A realistic scene of a tightrope stretched between two cliffs: on one side, a rigid, perfectly straight walker barely moves; on the other, a loose, unstable walker wobbles wildly. At the center, a balanced walker moves steadily. Natural lighting, wind, realistic textures, depth. No text, symbols, or diagrams.
metaphor: A tightrope walker balancing between rigidity and instability shows the tradeoff between underfitting and overfitting.
